title: Cisco VoIP - Desktop telephone (7841/8851) overview
body: This document explains how make a call, answer a call, and put a call on hold on a Cisco desktop phone. The video features a model 7841 telephone. However, the 8851 has similar functionality. If you need further help, please contact the DoIT Help Desk for assistance. See Also Cisco VoIP - 7841 Telephone diagram Cisco VoIP - 8851 Telephone diagram Cisco VoIP - Answer Calls/Do Not Disturb Mode on a desktop telephone (7841/8851) Cisco VoIP - Hold calls on desktop telephone (7841/8851) Cisco VoIP - Making calls from a Cisco desktop telephone (7841/8851) Cisco VoIP - Forward Calls on desktop phone telephone (7841/8851) Cisco VoIP - Conference Calls/3-Way calling on a desktop telephone phone (7851/8851) Cisco VoIP - Park calls on desktop telephone (7841/8851) Cisco VoIP - Transfer a Call on desktop telephone (7841/8851)
